problem id: 57e57b3c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(3)

examples:
  11001101 -> 00101000
  11000011 -> 00011000
  00101010 -> 01000000
  10010011 -> 00010000
  11000111 -> 00111000
  01110101 -> 10101000
  10000100 -> 00000000
  01101001 -> 00001000
  10101111 -> 01110000
  10100010 -> 00010000

query: 01010001
predicted answer: 00001000
